target: (It's speaking… but I can't see it…)

(Am I dead… or alive…
I can't even tell anymore)
Shinpei, can you hear my voice?

I don't know what this place is…
I really don't know.

Maybe… soon,
everything will disappear,
I have a feeling.

(I have a feeling I also…
felt that way)
Shinpei, you really did your best.

But no matter how hard you tried,
there were things you couldn't do,
things that couldn't be fulfilled.

Keychain…
you sent me a message
to take to the live show, right?

The character I liked as a child,
this character's merchandise…
I've been carrying it around all this time.
It reminds me of those happy times.
(It really does sound like her speaking.)

(But… just because,
it doesn't mean anything anymore…)
